notes: Mistral Vibe maintains a single-session task list via the builtin todo tool (action:'write' = full-list replace; TodoStatus pending|in_progress|completed|cancelled; auto-executes with no permission gate). The driver asks vibe to create three todos and walk each pending→in_progress→completed. The lifecycle arc (ready→working→ready) and SubagentCount=0 are asserted as phases. The tasks-content observable — three items in the session API tasks field with matching subjects + status — now DOES surface: commit 0fccc242 taught core/adapters/inbound/agents/vibe/parser.go to decode the todo tool's todos[] through tailer.TodoReconciler into TaskDeltas/TaskSnapshot (the reference pattern is opencode's todowrite), so daemon=full. That content is verified structurally in the replay golden (summary.tasks), not the phase DSL, exactly as claudecode/codex/opencode. BACKFLOW (live recording): mistral-vibe is a presession adapter — a transient proc-<PID> row is born ready before the real session_<id> transcript dir appears, then reconciles to a DIFFERENT session_id, so the birth is modeled as two phases (presession_birth → session_birth new_session) templated from the codex sibling, with every post-birth phase (incl. the task phases) anchored same_session_as session_birth. OBSERVATIONS reduced to agent-only (cost_nonzero=false, tokens_nonzero=false): the offline replay golden stages only transcript.jsonl, so vibe's meta.json sidecar model + tokens are unverifiable offline (same as kiro-cli).

text: proc-<PID> pre-session appears in ready within 1s of launch (PID bound before the transcript dir exists)
Real session_<id> reconciles (different session_id) when the transcript directory appears, born ready
vibe PID bound to the real session (matched by cwd)
User prompt drives the session ready → working

invariants: no state_transition to waiting for session
text: Session stays working across the todo create/write calls — todo is ToolPermission.ALWAYS (auto-executed, no permission gate fires); no child sessions spawn (SubagentCount stays 0)
Terminal no-tool assistant message drives turn_done: working → ready; final session state is ready; no child sessions were spawned
